script_text: Great readers think before they read.
They ask, why am I reading this book?
That question is called your purpose.
We read for two big reasons.
A storybook. We read it for fun!
A fact book. We read it to learn!
Imagine you want to learn how butterflies fly.
Which book fits? A fact book about butterflies!
Now imagine you want a bedtime story.
A storybook! Your purpose picks your book.
Before you open a book, ask yourself: what do I want from this book?
Now you are ready to read with purpose!
